methodology.scope: This is a likely publisher or portal-family attribution pass over rutracker setup installer filenames, not a claim of exact legal rights ownership for every title.
methodology.series_rule: High- or medium-confidence franchise keyword rules assign titles to specific publisher-family buckets such as PopCap, PlayFirst, Big Fish Games, MumboJumbo, iWin, Alawar, Oberon/RealArcade, Sandlot, Playrix, Spiderweb, and Sigma Team.
methodology.archive_overlap: Titles not matched by a specific franchise rule but present in the current archive-source corpus fall back to `Reflexive Portal Overlap`.
methodology.fallback: Titles with neither a series-rule match nor archive overlap fall into `Unattributed Other`.
